lease API so callers and distributed backends share one contract.

1335.name: millipede_core
1335.docs:
# millipede-core

Core primitives for the Millipede web crawler: request model, storage traits, events, errors, configuration.

**Status: pre-alpha skeleton.** This crate is part of the [Millipede](https://github.com/satvik007/millipede) workspace and does not yet expose a usable API. Real types land in later phases per `docs/ROADMAP.md`.

1058.name: abandon
1058.docs: Re-queues and consumes a lease without incrementing its request retry count.

227.name: MissingRoute
227.docs: No registered route matched a request's label and method.
